prompt: A Brazilian user emailed us requesting deletion of all their personal data. We store their data in our CRM, email platform, and analytics tool. How do we handle this under LGPD?
assertions: Identifies Art. 18, VI (deletion of consent-based data) and/or Art. 18, IV (unnecessary data deletion) as applicable rights
Specifies 15-day response timeframe for data access/full report under Art. 19
Notes Art. 16 retention exceptions (legal obligation, litigation, research) that may override deletion
Covers processor obligations under Art. 39 to instruct CRM/email/analytics vendors to delete
Mentions accountability/logging requirement and data subject's right to complain to ANPD if refused
